description_long: This wallet features a two-tone design with a green upper section adorned with a white, abstract batik-inspired pattern and a lower section that mimics a woven straw or bamboo texture in a natural yellowish hue. The wallet is rectangular and slim, with a long, matching green strap that allows it to be carried over the shoulder or across the body. The strap is attached at both upper corners and is made from the same patterned material as the upper section of the wallet. The surface appears to be made of fabric and synthetic materials, with the lower section possibly being a printed or textured synthetic to resemble woven straw. There are no visible fasteners or closure mechanisms on the exterior, suggesting a simple fold or internal closure. The wallet is compact and lightweight, suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban environment.
description: A slim, rectangular wallet with a green patterned fabric upper half, a yellow woven-texture lower half, and a matching green strap for carrying.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green patterned upper section, yellow woven-texture lower section, and the strap tied at the left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wallet's slim profile and the strap hanging down.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the full length of the green patterned strap and the back of the wallet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the strap's attachment and the wallet's thinness.
attribute_decorative_pattern: White abstract batik-inspired pattern on the green upper section; yellow lower section with a woven straw or bamboo texture.
attribute_attachment_or_chain: Green patterned fabric strap attached at both upper corners for carrying.
